stemHtml: How do you recognize a cold pool?

options.a: A cold pool may only be recognized on the surface chart as a high pressure area.
options.b: A cold pool may only be recognized on the surface chart as a low pressure area.
options.c: As a low pressure area aloft (e.g. on the 500 hPa chart).
options.d: As a high pressure area aloft (e.g. on the 500 hPa chart).
